name: codexgpt
description: Send prompts and local files from Codex to ChatGPT web in Safari, Chrome, or Chromium, then return visible responses and local result paths.

interface.shortDescription: Round-trip Codex prompts and files through ChatGPT web in Safari, Chrome, or Chromium
interface.longDescription: Use CodexGPT Bridge to hand text, Markdown, JSON, code, images, PDFs, and other local files from Codex to a logged-in ChatGPT web UI in Safari, Chrome, or Chromium. It keeps one ChatGPT web chat per Codex conversation unless a fresh chat is requested, then returns visible response text and local run artifact paths. On Ubuntu/Linux, Chrome/Chromium is controlled through a local Chrome DevTools connection. CodexGPT Bridge is community tooling and is not an official OpenAI product.
defaultPrompt: Send this draft to ChatGPT web for review.
Upload these files to ChatGPT web.
Start a new ChatGPT web chat for this task.
